info.name: API Gateway
info.description: Requests against the API Gateway. Import with baseUrl variable set to http://localhost:8000.

item.name: Actuator
item.description: Spring Boot Actuator endpoints for monitoring and managing the gateway application.

item.name: Health Check
item.description: Returns overall health status of the gateway. Used by load balancers and orchestrators to determine if the instance is healthy.

item.name: Application Info
item.description: Displays arbitrary application information from the InfoContributor beans. Useful for build metadata, Git info, and custom properties.

item.name: Prometheus Metrics
item.description: Prometheus scrape endpoint exposing gateway metrics (request count, latency, circuit breaker state, etc.) in Prometheus text format.

item.name: Gateway Routes
item.description: Lists all routes registered in the Spring Cloud Gateway. Each entry shows route ID, predicate, filters, and target URI. Useful for verifying route configuration at runtime.

item.name: Configuration Properties
item.description: Displays a collated view of all @ConfigurationProperties beans. Useful for debugging property binding and verifying runtime configuration values.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Future Auth Platform integration. Currently authentication is in mock mode - all requests pass through automatically.

item.name: Auth Platform Validation (future)
item.description: Placeholder for the future Auth Platform integration. Will validate tokens against the Auth Platform. Not yet implemented.

item.name: Gateway
item.description: Requests proxied by the API Gateway to downstream services. Each request maps to a configured Spring Cloud Gateway route.

item.name: Templates Service
item.description: Routes through the API Gateway to the templates service at localhost:8002.

item.name: List Templates
item.description: Routes through API Gateway to: http://localhost:8002/api/v1/templates

item.name: Fallback
item.description: Local fallback endpoints invoked when a circuit breaker is open.

item.name: Circuit Breaker Fallback
item.description: Fallback endpoint invoked by the CircuitBreaker filter when the circuit is open. Returns a 503 JSON response with correlation ID and route name.
